endpoints.name: Retrieve all flights
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all possible flights (both direct and connecting) between two airports on a given date. Routes are available for today and up to days in the future.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DESTINATION}} with a real destination. Replace {{PRODUCTCODE}} with a real productcode. Replace {{FROMDATE}} with a real fromdate. Replace {{ORIGIN}} with a real origin.

endpoints.name: Shipment Tracking
endpoints.description: With this tracking service you can easily retrieve your shipment or flight status information.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AWBPREFIX}} with a real awbprefix. Replace {{AWBNUMBER}} with a real awbnumber.

endpoints.name: Lounges
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Seat Maps
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DESTINATION}} with a real destination. Replace {{FLIGHTNUMBER}} with a real flightnumber. Replace {{DATE}} with a real date. Replace {{CABINCLASS}} with a real cabinclass. Replace {{ORIGIN}} with a real origin.

endpoints.name: Flight Status at Arrival Airport
endpoints.description: Status of all arrivals at a given airport up to 4 hours from the provided date time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AIRPORTCODE}} with a real airportcode. Replace {{FROMDATETIME}} with a real fromdatetime.

endpoints.name: Flight Status at Departure Airport
endpoints.description: Status of all departures from a given airport up to 4 hours from the provided date time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AIRPORTCODE}} with a real airportcode. Replace {{FROMDATETIME}} with a real fromdatetime.

endpoints.name: Flight Status by Route
endpoints.description: Status of flights between a given origin and destination on a given date.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DESTINATION}} with a real destination. Replace {{DATE}} with a real date. Replace {{ORIGIN}} with a real origin.

endpoints.name: Flight Status
endpoints.description: Status of a particular flight (boarding, delayed, etc.).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FLIGHTNUMBER}} with a real flightnumber. Replace {{DATE}} with a real date.

endpoints.name: Flight Schedules
endpoints.description: Scheduled flights between given airports on a given date.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FROMDATETIME}} with a real fromdatetime. Replace {{DESTINATION}} with a real destination. Replace {{ORIGIN}} with a real origin.

endpoints.name: Aircraft
endpoints.description: List all aircraft types or one specific aircraft type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AIRCRAFTCODE}} with a real aircraftcode.

endpoints.name: Airlines
endpoints.description: List all airlines or one specific airline.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AIRLINECODE}} with a real airlinecode.

endpoints.name: Nearest Airports
endpoints.description: List the 5 closest airports to the given latitude and longitude, irrespective of the radius of the reference point.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LATITUDE}} with a real latitude. Replace {{LONGITUDE}} with a real longitude.

endpoints.name: Airports
endpoints.description: List all airports or one specific airport. All airports response is very large. It is possible to request the response in a specific language.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AIRPORTCODE}} with a real airportcode.

endpoints.name: Cities
endpoints.description: List all cities or one specific city. It is possible to request the response in a specific language.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CITYCODE}} with a real citycode.

endpoints.name: Countries
endpoints.description: List all countries or one specific country. It is possible to request the response in a specific language.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COUNTRYCODE}} with a real countrycode.
